query: SELECT e.categoryId, ec.name as categoryName, CAST(SUM(e.amount) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as total, count(*) as cnt FROM expenses e LEFT JOIN expenseCategories ec ON e.categoryId = ec.id WHERE e.establishmentId = 30001 AND e.date >= '2026-02-01' GROUP BY e.categoryId, ec.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT e.categoryId, ec.name as categoryName, CAST(SUM(e.amount) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as total, count(*) as cnt FROM expenses e LEFT JOIN expenseCategories ec ON e.categoryId = ec.id WHERE e.establishmentId = 30001 AND e.date >= '2026-02-01' GROUP BY e.categoryId, ec.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20;
